title: dirtodi
description: Dirtodi is a mod about the varieties of the earth in Minecraft about what we didn't know about the earth and what we want to learn from the earth.The mod adds a lot of new dirt, and dirt is cool! I wish good luck to all the players who want to play my mod!
body:
Welcome to [Dirtodi Discord Server](https://discord.gg/AMryzJJTp8)

![Dirtodi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac8cb365c3b6b6ab31a481e28ff04e11876e0ac3.png)

Dirtodi is a Minecraft mod dedicated to the diversity of the dirt and what we don't know about the dirt yet, as well as what we want to learn from it. This mod adds many new types of dirt, and while the dirt itself is interesting, that's not all it offers. 

The name of the Dirtodi mod comes from the words "dirt" (earth) and "odi" (perhaps a hidden meaning that I did not come up with). Players can expect not only a wide variety of new types of dirt, but also a variety of unusual creatures, each of which has unique abilities and behavior. 

I wish good luck to all players who decide to plunge into this world of mysteries and adventures. Despite the difficulties in understanding what is happening, the mod promises unforgettable impressions and a lot of fun moments. Join the exploration of the unknown and discover all the secrets of the earth in the world of Dirtodi!:) 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Just in case, I apologize for my bad English.

</details>
